answers.where: Old Gate town hub with hero, Gate Warden, quest rail, and route strip visible
answers.action: Accept the wolf quest, then follow the highlighted route to North Road
answers.response: The first-screen capture shows the corrected target grammar before input; DevAPI smoke proves the later quest, travel, battle, loot, equip, and claim flow
answers.reward: The quest rail promises XP, gold, and ring reward; the route shows Old Mine as the next lock
answers.game_look: It now reads more like a fantasy browser RPG hub than a separated debug dashboard, but art is still shape-composed placeholder

issues.text: shape-composed placeholder art still blocks product visual acceptance
fantasy browser RPG UX is closer, but asset style still does not match the desired game
quest rail is more integrated, but controls still look like prototype buttons

problem: UX composition improved from detached town/map panels to one town hub with quest rail and route strip, but the screen still uses debug shape art instead of product-grade fantasy location, character, item, icon, and UI assets.
next: Generate or import accepted project-local fantasy location, NPC/hero/wolf, route, reward, and UI frame assets; pack them through the asset pipeline; then recapture first/reward/locked/transient states.
